title: Predictive Customer Churn Model

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Predictive Customer Churn Model

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='20' y='40' font-size='24' fill='#C06C88'>Predictive Customer Churn Model</text>
  <rect x='20' y='100' width='360' height='30' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='25' y='120' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Search for customer</text>
  <rect x='20' y='150' width='360' height='30' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <g transform='translate(20,150)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='10' height='30' fill='#C06C88'/>
    <rect x='15' y='0' width='10' height='30' fill='#C06C88'/>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(20,180)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='10' height='30' fill='#C06C88'/>
    <rect x='15' y='0' width='10' height='30' fill='#C06C88'/>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(20,210)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='10' height='30' fill='#C06C88'/>
    <rect x='15' y='0' width='10' height='30' fill='#C06C88'/>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(220,120)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='10' height='30' fill='#C06C88'/>
    <rect x='15' y='0' width='10' height='30' fill='#C06C88'/>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(220,150)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='10' height='30' fill='#C06C88'/>
    <rect x='15' y='0' width='10' height='30' fill='#C06C88'/>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(220,180)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='10' height='30' fill='#C06C88'/>
    <rect x='15' y='0' width='10' height='30' fill='#C06C88'/>
  </g>
  <!-- Card -->
  <rect x='220' y='210' width='150' height='80' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='230' y='240' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Customer Name</text>
  <text x='230' y='260' font-size='18' fill='#411C56'>Churn Probability: 20%</text>
  <rect x='250' y='230' width='50' height='30' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='255' y='240' font-size='14' fill='#411C56'>Call to Action</text>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Must include a search bar and a dark mode toggle

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Predictive Customer Churn Model

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, search functionality, and dark mode toggle.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
